game_name: Best of the Best: Championship Karate
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Best of the Best: Championship Karate (SNES)
notes: MIDI data chunks are present in ROM but original instruments are not documented. MIDI files can be extracted from ROM addresses (0x5ECB0, 0x65A30, 0x64482, 0xF8A53, 0xF9E14, 0xF94D2, 0xFA11E, 0xFE300) but playback requires FluidSynth with external soundfont. No tempo, key, chord progression, or SFX characteristic data is documented in available sources.
